steps.title: Identify the length in terms of width
steps.content:
Let $w$ = width. Since the length is 35 centimeters greater than the width:
$$\text{length} = w + 35$$

steps.title: Apply the area formula for a rectangle
steps.content: Area = length $\times$ width, so: $$A = (w + 35) \times w = (w)(w + 35)$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
